title: Sun Pharma to buy Organon in $11.75 billion all-cash deal
summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries has agreed to acquire U.S. drugmaker Organon & Co in an all-cash deal valued at approximately $11.75 billion, including debt. The agreement stipulates Sun Pharma will purchase all outstanding Organon shares for $14.00 per share....
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Sun Pharmaceutical Industries will buy Organon & Co in an all‑cash deal, valuing ‌the U.S. ⁠drugmaker ⁠at about $11.75 billion including debt, the companies said on Sunday.

Under the definitive agreement, Sun Pharma will ⁠buy all ‌the outstanding shares of Organon ⁠for $14.00 per share in cash, the companies said in a joint statement.

The deal would give Sun Pharma full ‌ownership of Organon, which was spun off from ⁠Merck in 2021 that focuses on women's health, biosimilars and established medicines.
